title: Vignette Status
description: Vignette Status adds a vignette overlay when low on health, hunger or air.
body:
Vignette Status adds a vignette overlay when low on health, hunger or air.

About this mod

![shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6f843675d920265470452f07edb1281d5d530d5.png)

Configuration:

  • Opacity
  • Fade in / Fade out speed
  • Vignette Color
  • Hearts/Hunger/Air lost to begin Vignette effect

Fully compatible with Iris Shaders, Sodium and Lithium.

---

FAQ

  • Can I use this in my modpack?
    • Yes. Go for it!
  • Forge? Pwetty plz
    • No. Sorry.
  • Incompatibilities?
    • None. So far
